message:
chore(gitignore): ignore NTM runtime state, ATC test scratch DBs, test ELF binaries

Three ephemeral patterns that have been accumulating as untracked
(or constantly-modified) noise during multi-agent work are now
ignored:

- `.ntm/` — the NTM (agent tmux orchestrator) runtime-state
  directory. Holds per-machine log files, PID files, and a
  `rate_limits.json` that churns on every agent tick. The contents
  are inherently per-machine and already-tracked entries should be
  untracked separately; this at least prevents fresh NTM state from
  being picked up by `git add .`. Filed as a known follow-up: the
  existing `.ntm/logs/*.log`, `.ntm/pids/*.pid`, and
  `.ntm/rate_limits.json` remain tracked until a deliberate
  `git rm --cached` pass.

- `test_env_read`, `test_guard`, and the generic `test_*` root-level
  pattern — compiled ELF binaries that `cargo test --no-run` /
  `cargo build --bin` drop at the repo root when someone runs a
  one-off build outside the target directory. Each is ~4 MB, and
  they are regenerated on every build. `!test_*.rs` and
  `!test_*.sh` preserve tracked scripts and test sources that
  happen to share the prefix.

- `crates/**/atc_rollup_test_*` and root-level
  `atc_rollup_test_*` — 12 KB SQLite scratch databases that the
  ATC rollup test harness drops when run outside a tempdir.
  `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/atc_rollup_test_1` was the specific
  file that kept showing up this session.

No currently-tracked files are re-classified by this change — new
ephemeral artifacts matching these patterns will now be skipped by
`git status` and `git add`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -294,6 +294,18 @@ storage.sqlite3.activity.lock
 test_bug
 test_dir
 test_dotenv
+test_env_read
+test_guard
+test_*
+!test_*.rs
+!test_*.sh
+
+# NTM (agent tmux orchestrator) runtime state — per-machine, never tracked
+.ntm/
+
+# ATC rollup scratch test databases (SQLite, created under crates/*)
+crates/**/atc_rollup_test_*
+atc_rollup_test_*
 
 # Release preparation build artifacts
 .cargo-home-release-prep/
